dataList.name: Desperado
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 2
- For every Stack, Base Attack Skill Clash Power +1, Base Power +1
- At 2 Stack, Base Attack Skill Plus Coin Power +1, Minus Coin Power -1
- Expires at Turn End

dataList.name: Hyped-up
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 3
- For every Stack, deal +5% damage with Wrath and Lust Skills
- When hit, raise this unit's Stagger Threshold by (5 x Stack)
- Expires at Turn End

dataList.name: Pink Petals
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 30
- For every Stack, take +1% damage when hit by Gloom Skills (max 15%)
- For every 10 Stack, gain +1 Sinking Count when hit (2 times per turn)
- When Tremor Burst is triggered on this unit, take ((Sinking Potency + Pink Petals) / 5) Gloom damage
- Turn End: Lose 1 Stack

dataList.name: Pheromone
dataList.desc:
- Gain +10 Aggro
- When hit, inflict 3 Burn on target

dataList.name: Pheromone Mark
dataList.desc:
- For every 3 Burn on self, take +1% damage when hit (max 20%)
- Expires at Turn End

dataList.name: Preparing Herd Migration
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 3
- Combat Start: Lose 1 Stack
- At 0 Stack, use 'Herd Migration' at Turn Start

dataList.name: Herd Relocation
dataList.desc:
- Turn End: recover from Stagger and escape from the Encounter
(Unless it's a forced Stagger; does not count as death)
- In Chain Battles, give this unit's Slots to a Substituted unit and move to the rearmost place in the Backup units' Deployment order

dataList.name: BongBong Orange
dataList.desc:
- Max Stack: 1
Turn Start: At less than 60% HP, heal 30% HP and lose this effect

dataList.name: Welfare Team Captain
dataList.desc:
- Skill Slot +1
  - Modify Skill pool: Gain 1 copy of Skill 3, but lose 1 copy of Skill 1
- Increase the amount of Burn, Bleed, Rupture, Sinking, or Tremor Potency inflicted with Skills by +2 (including 'Unique Status Effects')
- Base Skills that gain or spend Ammo deal +30% damage
- On Use with Base Skills that gain or spend Ammo, heal 10 SP for 1 ally with the lowest SP (including this unit)
- On Kill, activate the following:
· E.G.O Resource +2 to the Affinity that killed the enemy; E.G.O Resource +1 to all Affinities
· Next turn, inflict the remaining Burn, Bleed, Rupture, Sinking, and Tremor Potency and Count on the said enemy randomly between all enemies (min 1)
